messages.content:
Describe a secure coding practice to mitigate authorization vulnerabilities.

Missing Authorization vulnerability in Profilegrid ProfileGrid – User Profiles, Memberships, Groups and Communities.This issue affects ProfileGrid – User Profiles, Memberships, Groups and Communities: from n/a through 5.0.3.
Implement role-based access control (RBAC) to ensure that users can only access resources and perform actions permitted to their role, thereby mitigating authorization vulnerabilities.
